info.name: Kachō VPC — RO
info.description: Quota-aware sub-suite (ro). Uses existingFolderId / existingFolderCrossId from env; preflight creates shared net/subnet/sg/rt/gw inside FOLDER.

exec: // existingFolderId is mandatory in this suite — skip setup-org/cloud/folder.

Empty folder_id is sync-validated before Operation creation.

item.name: NET-CR-EMPTY-NAME — Network create with empty name
item.description:
Expected YC: 200 — Network created with empty name (YC permissive on Network names).
Kachō: rejects empty name with HTTP 400 fieldViolations[name].
Status: Kachō stricter, documented in YC-DIFF-NAME-VALIDATION.md.

item.name: NET-LIST — Network list response shape
item.description:
Compare YC vpc:Network list response shape with Kachō.
Expected from YC: networks[].id is base32 (~20 chars), createdAt RFC3339, fields camelCase, defaultSecurityGroupId present (Kachō missing).
Status: matches structurally; some YC-only fields documented as deviation.

item.name: NET-LIST-PAGE-TOKEN-LEAK — pageToken does not leak server internals
item.description:
Expected YC: nextPageToken is opaque (no plaintext IDs / timestamps).
Kachō: nextPageToken is base64 of '<timestamp>:<uuid>' — leaks ordering keys.
Status: documented in finding PAGE-TOKEN-LEAK.md (Kachō).

item.name: YC-OP-VPC-LOCAL-404 — Operations not exposed on per-domain gateway
item.description:
Expected YC: GET /vpc/v1/operations/<id> → 404 (Operations live on operation.api.cloud.yandex.net,
not on each domain gateway). Kachō exposes /operations/<id> directly on api-gateway.
Status: deployment-topology diff, not a contract issue.
